## Checklist

- [ ] `make app` builds clean
- [ ] `swiftlint lint` introduces no new violations
- [ ] Comments explain the WHY for any non-obvious decision (see
      docs/CONTRIBUTING.md → Style)
- [ ] No `Co-Authored-By` / AI-attribution trailers in commits
